raw: Each unique discount code provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Patron's must utilize the discount code online to make a reservation for the museum. This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617 278 5156.

source_phrases.free_under_age: children under the age of 18 are always admitted free
source_phrases.savings_per_person_usd: up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person
